name: Role Agents Workspace
description: Houston workspace of hireable role agents — each represents a single job title a human could hold (SDR, Executive Assistant, PMM, Recruiter, Customer Support Rep, Content Editor, Data Analyst, CSM, Chief of Staff). Every agent is fully useful on its own: own skills, own dashboard, own data at its agent root. No cross-agent paths in default skills. External tool access flows through Composio — connect whatever you use (Gmail, Slack, CRM, calendar, warehouse, etc.) and the agents discover tool slugs via `composio search`. Install the whole workspace to staff up a solo founder's back office, or extract any single agent into its own installation.
